programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on recently aired shows, including watching Game of Talents, Line of Duty, Catfish UK: The TV Show, Four in a Bed, Paranormal Activity and Cher & the Loneliest Elephant. Plus, they share their observations of the coverage of the funeral of HRH the Duke of Edinburgh and Good Morning Britain's report of an altercation between Labour leader Keir Starmer and a pub landlord

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Self-made millionaire Delia is looking for a man to build a future with - could City trader Mark be the one? Bengy has a trauma from his past he is reluctant to share - luckily Lara is a caring soul with a listening ear. Butcher Nick is excited at the thought of meeting someone, even though he admits he doesn't know how to speak to women

programme.title: Baby Surgeons: Delivering Miracles
programme.desc: Three expectant mothers face dangerous complications in their pregnancies, and have to decide whether they are willing to undergo pioneering but potentially risky surgery for a successful birth. A woman carrying triplets shows signs of a rare blood condition that can cause miscarriages, another mother's foetus has become entangled in the lining of the womb and risks losing a foot, and a woman who is 36 weeks pregnant discovers that her baby has fluid building up in its brain

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: With no guests to entertain at the chateau this year, the overhaul of the orangery continues. All the family come together to build an open kitchen, create a pop-up restaurant and cook a menu of memories featuring dishes from Dick and Angel's years together

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: After 15 years of saving and planning, ecologist Fred and communications manager Saffron Baker start building work on their new family home in a village in the Peak District. However, the couple face difficulties as the start of construction proves more a feat of civil engineering than a house build, and work comes to a halt when their self-build mortgage falls through

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a couple in Rushden in Northamptonshire who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. programme.title: Frank of Ireland
programme.desc: Aine tells Frank that things are getting serious between her and Peter-Brian, prompting him to join forces with Doofus to expose the object of her affection. Meanwhile, Mary takes on a tenant or two to help cover the mortgage. Comedy, with Brian Gleeson, Domhnall Gleeson, Pom Boyd, Sarah Greene and Tom Vaughan-Lawlor

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farmer Chris Moore hosts the third dinner party in Lincolnshire, where he plans to wow his guests with a beetroot-themed dinner. However, it is not just his obsession with the vegetable that surprises his diners, as they soon discover he has some hidden talents

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day four in Lincolnshire, Jack Stone plans to win over his guests with a creative evening during which they will have the chance to make their own food, but the DIY pizzas don't go to plan. Meanwhile, an interesting outfit from Alex Coxon gets the attention of Chris Moore

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Rosie takes Jenny on a horse ride along the waterfront, and they take to the skies on the world's fastest zip wire. As the sun sets, they meet a coast craft expert, who teaches them essential survival skills on one of the island's many picturesque beaches - and it's quickly evident they'd not last more than few hours if left to fend for themselves. programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: On the A1 near Leeds, an intoxicated driver rams a police car before heading the wrong way down the dual carriageway and the cops instigate a risky containment manoeuvre to bring him to a standstill. In Halifax, a criminal's wellbeing becomes officers' primary concern after they discover a trail of blood at the scene of an apparent drink-related crash

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of high-speed interception teams, this time with access to the officers of Cumbria's Roads Policing Unit. Glen has a busy night in Barrow-in-Furness dealing with a drunk and a runaway knifeman, and Colin detains a suspected drug dealer who has a wrap of heroin hidden in a very intimate place. Countryside and city collide when Duggie has to tackle a trailer full of cows that has overturned, blocking the main carriageway into Carlisle, while the alcohol-fuelled actions of one driver send officers rushing to evacuate villagers in the middle of the night after a crash ruptures a gas main

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A stick of dynamite causes chaos for Duggie when it is brought into Carlisle's main police station and the armed response unit is called out after there is a report of a gun being spotted in a city centre bar. Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows, officers haul in a driver who is well over the limit and Hayley comes to the rescue when a teenager's car hits a wall during a late-night drive. Documentary following the work of Cumbria's Roads Policing Unit

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Ross and John put their armed-response training to the test when they tackle a suspected gunman, while teams are called out to deal with the results of dangerous driving after a person parks on a roundabout and a pedestrian is crushed under a car. Elsewhere, officers raid a cannabis farm, a Reliant Robin is bid a fiery farewell, and Phil finds out what happens when the driver of a Subaru Impreza decides to take on an HGV

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A critically ill patient is brought into the emergency department after suffering a sudden cardiac arrest while in a local cafe with his wife. Meanwhile, doctor Bharath Reddy treats Maxine, who broke her wrist when she slipped de-icing the car, and another patient is treated after fracturing her shoulder

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Neighbours

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac is in critical condition, and everyone rushes to save her, although her unborn baby's life hangs in the balance. Alf and Roo deal with the Susie fallout

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Documentary showing how CCTV and other technological advances are helping to bring car thieves to justice. Suspected criminals in Chester are involved in a high-speed chase through the city centre, and there is footage that helped put an end to one of London's most prolific gangs. The programme also includes film of a getaway in which robbers tried to evade the law by driving at 180mph

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall arrives in Leeds, where English bulldog Wilson's destructive behaviour is making his owner so distraught that she is considering having him rehomed. Realising that this bolshie bulldog's behaviour is all for attention, Graeme sets about turning it around and to restore harmony to the home. Later, in Northampton, Graeme encounters Pomeranians Bella and Lola, who are attacking anything coming through the door

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: From endless food and drink to hotels with kids' clubs and water parks, going all-inclusive is supposed to be all about hassle-free fun in the sun. But for some, this option proves anything but relaxing. Here cameras follow the unlucky holidaymakers whose breaks went horribly wrong. They include nurse Julia Vaughan, who spent more than £5,500 on a relaxing break in Crete for herself and her family, only to be confronted by a giant construction site next to their hotel

programme.title: All You Can Eat: Secrets of the World's Mega Buffet
programme.desc: The JRC Global Buffet in Watford is one of the biggest restaurants in the UK. Covering 27,000 square feet, and serving up to 350 dishes from all over the world, it can feed as many as 3,000 people every day. Cameras reveal how the company can feed people as much as they want for a set price and keep their business booming

programme.title: Watchmen (2009)
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, former superheroes driven into retirement by public outcry are confronted with the murder of one of their number. As they face the possibility of a conspiracy to eliminate them, they must contend with a world edging closer to the brink of nuclear war. Sci-fi drama, based on Alan Moore and Dave Gibbons' graphic novel, starring Patrick Wilson, Jackie Earle Haley, Malin Akerman and Billy Crudup

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A critically ill patient is brought into the emergency department after suffering a sudden cardiac arrest while in a local cafe with his wife. Meanwhile, doctor Bharath Reddy treats Maxine, who broke her wrist when she slipped de-icing the car, and another patient is treated after fracturing her shoulder

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: The staff step back in time when they venture down into tunnels under the station to carry out fire safety checks, and it is the start of a bank holiday getaway for thousands of commuters. Jennie, Great Western Railway's new customer ambassador, manages to seat a troupe of young cheerleaders all together, but faces a much bigger challenge when fire alarms go off during rush hour

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Highlights of the documentary giving an insight into the working life of officers patrolling the nation's roads as they combine modern technology and old-fashioned methods to bring criminals to justice. Officers pursue a drug runner down one of the UK's busiest motorways, and a drug deal results in a white-knuckle race through Bradford's back streets

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed night-time pursuit in Bradford heightens tensions in the local community, with outnumbered cops facing the prospect of a potential riot. An apparently routine stop takes a serious turn as the vehicle pulled over is thought to contain a firearm and the unarmed officers must hold their nerve as they wait for a specialist team to join them. Jamie Theakston narrates

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Duggie and Mark show that they are as quick on their feet as they are behind the wheel when a serial offender tries to give them the runaround. A high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish, PC Dan Myerscough loses patience with a silver-tongued drunk, and officers Martin and Hayley are called out to a 4x4 that has come a cropper due to treacherous ice

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Angus and Sean resort to smashing down a door in a desperate attempt to save a man's life, and Kev and Colin spot a car being driven in the wrong direction down a motorway. Darren encounters a pizza delivery man who is under the influence of alcohol, while out on patrol, Hayley observes the damage that can be caused by Cumbria's treacherously icy roads

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers patrol during Black Eye Friday - one of Cumbria's most alcohol-fuelled nights of the year, and help a woman trapped inside a burning car. Meanwhile, a boy racer is made to call his mother after being caught misbehaving, and a motorway pursuit is brought to an abrupt end

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: This time, paediatric sister Jemma Wray treats two critically ill children - 10-year-old Kai has been having seizures, and 18-month-old Joel is struggling to breathe. Elsewhere, nurse Will Gibbons looks after a 28-year-old patient who has been in a motorbike accident, and 51-year-old Andrew comes into the hospital after damaging his fingers with a circular saw

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Aaron and David realise their attempt at a firm hand with Brent is not working. Nicolette and Chloe enjoy their days together, with Chloe feeling happier than ever

programme.title: Home and Away

The programme also includes film of a getaway in which robbers tried to evade the law by driving at 180mph

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Revenue inspector Scott is on the lookout for fare evaders attempting to force their way through the ticket barriers. Alex and Baba join forces with the police in a sting operation along a busy stretch on one of the city's busiest bus routes

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Security is called after a patient suspected of having Covid-19 ties wires around his door handles in protest after being asked not to roam around the department, while 25-year-old Chelsea arrives in resus by air ambulance after being hit by a car while on a night out. In minors, 68-year-old Roger has managed to accidentally swallow disinfectant and is worried he's caused serious internal damage, while a team tries to revive a patient who is having a cardiac arrest

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Thirty-eight-year-old Lesley is rushed in when her heart stops while she is driving to work, leaving Dr Morris battle to resuscitate her and investigate why a normally fit and well woman with no known medical problems would suffer such an attack. Abigail, aged 20, is treated for a painful neck injury caused by a riding fall, and 28-year-old Laura is brought in having a severe asthma attack. It is clear to Dr Fawcett she is deteriorating fast and that her heart could stop at any moment

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman (1982)
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso

Staff have to deal with a series of medical emergencies at the station, including a fall on an escalator, an epileptic seizure and a suspected cardiac arrest

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: A super sleuth attempts to bring down a seven-and-a-half-ton fly-by-night dumper, proving that cameras never lie. And in Braintree, Essex, former military man Stu is out to blanket his entire county in hidden CCTV, in order to catch the culprits plaguing his patch

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed chase in Bradford is ended when CS gas is used to bring a determined speeder to justice, while teams are out on quiet back roads as they track two cars that are thought to be connected with various firearms offences. Plus, burglars find out they cannot outrun the cops when weighed down with a quad bike and trailing a cloud of cannabis behind them

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed chase in Bradford's crowded streets ends very suddenly and the driver claims he just wants to get home to eat his takeaway while it is still hot. But is that the whole story? In Harrogate, a volatile drink-driver's rapid mood swings prove a test for the cops, while a large stash of cannabis is found at the scene of a major collision, which has left one person with life-threatening injuries. A couple suspected of dealing drugs are chased down and taken to the station, where they provide the traffic team with contrasting reactions to being held in custody. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers Hayley and Ben can barely believe their eyes when they encounter a drunk driver in the fast lane of the M6, and dog handler Glenn is given a crash course in marine rescue when he answers an emergency distress call. Plus, a monster-truck owner tries to give police the slip and a pizza-delivery driver gets a special order from the interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A huge haul of cash is uncovered during a routine stop, leaving Duggie speechless, and a van driver tries to ram an interceptor on the busy M6. Meanwhile, Hayley and Ben rush to a frightening accident on the motorway, dog-handler Barry catches a burglar and the air ambulance is scrambled to a crash involving a school bus on a country road

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Hayley rushes to help two badly injured motorcyclists, while Ross and John haul in a drink-driver who has left a trail of destruction in his wake. Duncan has to escort a 176-wheel monster truck through Workington, Steve deals with a boy racer, Tom goes undercover on the trail of some suspected bike thieves, and Duggie plays gooseberry on a couple's first date

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: It is nurse Jade's final shift in Barnsley Hospital's casualty department and auxiliary nurse Mike is determined to give her a good send-off. In paediatrics, registrar Dr Nick Mani is seeing a nine-month-old boy who has a very high temperature, while physiotherapist Jovan helps a 90-year-old woman who banged her head in the hospital restaurant

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: A mysterious woman arrives, offering help to Ned at The Hive. Susan refuses to choose between her two very passionate teachers

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella gets fed up with Ryder and Chloe, the Surf Club is in a shambles on account of John trusting Susie. Justin gets into a horrific accident after a fight with Leah and John

programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: The retailer prepares for Christmas, the most important time of year for supermarkets with preparations made as much as 10 months in advance. With Christmas TV adverts becoming more competitive than ever, Iceland enters into an arrangement with Disney to tie their promotional campaign to the release of Frozen 2. They also launch some new festive products, including a chocolate and caramel pudding and a complete Christmas dinner in a pie

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow folks whose clever ideas and savvy schemes save them a small fortune

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan help a woman who has not unpacked two years after moving into her first floor flat, and who struggles to give up things she does not need

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Deep-cleaning expert George and his team face one of their toughest assignments yet - a house in Crosby, Merseyside that is almost literally bursting at the seams with clutter. Owner Paul has decided enough is enough, and he wants to sell his house and hoard to fund his retirement. But the property is infested with vermin and the kitchen a biohazard, so it is not going to be an easy sell in its current state

programme.title: Gypsy Eviction: The Battle for Dale Farm
programme.desc: Although travellers legally owned the land of Dale Farm in Essex, they did not have planning permission to develop it and the site grew in size. Early attempts by the council to move them on were thwarted by the New Labour government, and the adoption of the Human Rights Laws resulted in a stalemate between the resident travellers and the council that lasted a decade. Through interviews with people on both sides of the eviction, this film looks back at the dramatic events of 2011

programme.title: 5 Clues That Caught the Killer: Rhys Jones
programme.desc: Documentary examining the investigation into the murder of 11-year-old Rhys Jones, a schoolboy shot dead on his way home from football training in 2007. The programme looks at how police managed to make the vital breakthroughs that finally put Rhys' killer behind bars, featuring interviews with police officers and specialists directly involved in the case

programme.title: When Kids Kill
programme.desc: The case of a London gang who murdered 17-year-old Marcel Addai after an ongoing feud on social media, which saw gang members threatening each other in homemade rap videos

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits by the Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following Britons living the high life on a low budget in Blackpool, one of the country's favourite resorts, from holiday-makers to those who have made the Lancashire town their home. Entertainer Simon Green - aka Betty Legs Diamond - talks about his life as a drag queen, and Scottish sisters Agnes and Margaret get more than they bargained for as part of their holiday package. Meanwhile, Jamie Diggins, who works as an estate agent for caravans, takes delivery of a static home that costs an amazing £280,000

programme.desc: Jessica tries to clear medic Seth Hazlitt after he is threatened with a possible malpractice suit when the owner of Cabot Cove's computer company dies in mysterious circumstances. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is granted protective custody of a 10-year-old orphaned refugee, Elena, when an NCIS case reveals she is the target of a violent gang. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team searches for a petty officer suspected of assault, who escapes when the van transporting him crashes into a lake. Torres works with a witness who heard vital evidence

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the suspicious death of a reality TV contestant. They discover the show's producers had been provoking bad feeling toward the dead man among his fellow participants, while a cameraman reveals that his last moments were captured on film. However, the incriminating tape cannot be found. Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have difficulty pinning the death of a strangled woman on their prime suspect, drug dealer Francis 'Taz' Partell. However, while questioning one of his former associates, they discover new evidence indicating he was responsible for another murder in the Bronx

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of Richard Speigel, chief financial officer for an exclusive, family owned department store, results in the arrests of the shop staff - but the manager and father refuses to let his offspring take the blame, and goes all out to get them off the hook. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an alleyway, and the detectives discover he shined shoes for a living. They begin by looking for his most recent customers, and learn the victim was a Vietnam war veteran, shedding light on possible motives and suspects

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy widow and her daughter are implicated in the death of a hitman out on parole - and it's up to the squad to find out whether the pair hired the victim to kill a rich relative. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The squad investigates when a wealthy man is found murdered, and discover his family were all striving to get their hands on the inheritance. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sara Carter begs Gibbs to investigate her mother's murder, as she believes the local authorities have convicted the wrong man. Abby is awarded a dinner reservation for two to a new five-star restaurant in an igloo, and has to decide which co-worker deserves to go with her. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Skye P Marshall star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When evidence reveals an NCIS team member is a hitman's latest target, the team members are tasked with searching through old case files to determine who is seeking vengeance. Reeves dies from injuries sustained in the gunfight with the mugger, having instinctively protected Abby, who ends up in the hospital. It transpired the mugger was hired by Robert King, who held a grudge against Abby since his arrest. Looking over Reeves' body in the autopsy room, Abby vows to carry on his wish to start a charity in his native London, deciding to leave NCIS to do so. Pauley Perrette stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While Gibbs attends the memorial service for a friend who was lost at sea, he discovers that the deceased man, Navy Captain Phillip Brooks, had been hiding in a fallout shelter after his boat was attacked and swam to shore. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sean Murray star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates a man overboard fatality from a Navy destroyer at sea. Torres is frustrated with Vance's assignment to mentor three high school students. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Wilmer Valderrama

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are assigned to investigate the murder of a woman who was poisoned by an anonymous package, and unearth a dark secret stretching back to her childhood. They also uncover a conspiracy linked to the case that could cause huge problems for an expensive campaign being organised by the Church. Guest starring Stephen Colbert

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the mysterious drowning of a neurologist who was due to appear in court as an expert witness in a euthanasia case. They learn that the doctor was trying to communicate with the patient in question, who is in a persistent vegetative state. Guest starring John Savage

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: The detectives continue to investigate the case of the missing diamonds, and the task force executes a major drug bust

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The head of a notorious Puerto Rican gang is found dead outside a hotel shortly after his predecessor is released from jail. Mac is forced to use his diplomatic skills to prevent a revenge attack - but a second death and an ambush on a police car lead him to believe the killer is a disgruntled insider. Drama, starring Gary Sinise, with Edward James Olmos (Battlestar Galactica, Blade Runner)

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and his comrades are still reeling from the scope of the ambush and the surprise return of Juliette, who has returned in the form of Eve, so that it is not really Juliette at all. In light of the heightened Wesen violence, Monroe and Rosalee seek answers from the Wesen Council, while Trubel has some important information for Nick. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli, Russell Hornsby and Bitsie Tulloch

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a mysterious sighting linked to a tourist's death at a local lake. Nick is shown the scope of the Wesen uprising as the secret government agency takes him into the heart of their Portland operations centre. Elsewhere, Rosalee's past comes back to haunt her, while Renard continues to support a candidate for mayor

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of Karen Hall, a staff member in the State Attorney General's Office, whose body has been found in the Hudson River - and her boss Frank Conroy quickly becomes a suspect. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a couple found dead in their apartment, following a trail of drugs and money to the wife of an army officer responsible for anti-narcotics operations in Colombia. Despite the woman's reluctance to co-operate with the police, McCoy convinces her she has no choice but to risk her life in a bid to catch the murderer. Charlotte d'Amboise guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The case against a man accused of shooting the leader of the African-American Congress is jeopardised by the revelation that the prosecution's chief witness was once an informant for the FBI, and is still under their protection

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A double homicide is linked to diamonds used to fund civil war in Sierra Leone, and the detectives uncover the extent of the fighting when warring factions are found in the United States. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an apartment block resident prompts Briscoe and Green to investigate her long-standing battle with the landlord in the hope of finding a credible suspect. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a sleazy retired policeman in a neighbourhood notorious for prostitution leads Briscoe and Curtis to two suburban housewives who are secretly moonlighting. However, it soon becomes apparent that whoever killed the victim could have been acting in self-defence. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate the death of a senior navy officer on board presidential plane Air Force One. Forensic tests indicate the fatality was due to natural causes, but Abby remains convinced he was murdered. US drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US marine's parachute fails to open during a training exercise and he plunges to his death, leaving the team to determine whether he was murdered. The man had a reputation for good fortune and invariably walked away from accidents unscathed - but his luck at the poker table may have cost him dearly. Mark Harmon and David McCallum star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A naval commander's body is washed ashore along with the bullet-riddled corpses of two drug traffickers, suggesting he was involved in illicit activities. Gibbs refuses to believe the worst and tries to prove the man's innocence by finding whoever else was involved in the shoot-out. Guest starring Emilie de Ravin (Lost)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A stable worker resorts to smuggling, deception, extortion and murder in the hope of financing the purchase of a farm to put him on the first rung of the social ladder in the equestrian world. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames uncover how a rich woman's lust for fame and a professional fundraiser's desperation to pay off a loan shark may have led to the murder of two people. Police drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The patriarch of a wealthy family is beaten to death with a hockey stick, and there are a number of possible suspects. The list includes the man's estranged wife, his son, and even the children's nanny, but they seem to have as many alibis as they do motives. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives have their work cut out for them when three major cases all come in at midnight. Meanwhile, Tensions boil over between Rollins and Carisi

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Armed robbers break into the apartment of lawyer Roland Carson and make off in a helicopter with jewels worth more than $5million. The detectives investigate and, as people who have come into contact with the gems start to turn up dead, they suspect Carson could have staged the whole affair and killed his accomplices to cover his tracks. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A barbaric Wesen ritual is brought to the present, while Nick, Hank and Wu seem already to be five steps behind the serial killer. Monroe goes undercover, Hadrian's Wall's war against Black Claw intensifies and Eve employs her unique skills to interrogate a suspect. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Monroe receives a call from a relative in Germany that promises to bring Nick closer to his ancestors. However, matters become complicated when it transpires the nefarious group Black Claw is also after the same artifacts. Elsewhere, Renard helps a mayoral candidate get an edge on his opponent, and Trubel confronts Eve about Nick and Adalind. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Amish country in search of a special handmade quilt, but finds herself embroiled in yet another baffling murder investigation. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US marine's parachute fails to open during a training exercise and he plunges to his death, leaving the team to determine whether he was murdered. The man had a reputation for good fortune and invariably walked away from accidents unscathed - but his luck at the poker table may have cost him dearly. Mark Harmon and David McCallum star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A naval commander's body is washed ashore along with the bullet-riddled corpses of two drug traffickers, suggesting he was involved in illicit activities. Gibbs refuses to believe the worst and tries to prove the man's innocence by finding whoever else was involved in the shoot-out. Guest starring Emilie de Ravin (Lost)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a Hispanic man found dead from a severe chest trauma after being involved in a staged car accident with two other illegal immigrants - and soon find evidence linking similar incidents with the same employer, chiropractor and insurance adjuster. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a student who proves to be the estranged son of a powerful real-estate tycoon. The finger of blame points to a mystery woman seen with the victim outside the college, and when tracked down, she claims to be his sister. However, Briscoe is not convinced, and suspects an extortion scheme

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An angry woman who blames her former daughter-in-law's new husband for her son's death hires a hitman to exact retribution. Briscoe and Curtis manage to get their hands on the contract killer but fail to understand why his customer has gone to such extreme lengths

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a singer's wife, questioning the man's manager - who proves to have formerly owned the murder weapon. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous defence lawyer embarks on a smear campaign against the victim. Gary Busey guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team discovers a former fingerprint examiner may have provided false testimony to help the prosecution in several court cases. To make matters worse, it transpires that Van Buren earned her promotion thanks to two of these fraudulent convictions. Award-winning police drama, starring S Epatha Merkerson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: First of a three-part story. The team investigates when the headless corpse of a film studio executive is found floating in a river, and her personal trainer and ex-husband soon prove likely suspects. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates a role-playing game believed to have caused the death of a sailor who was found at the bottom of the sea in his dress whites. Discovering the dead man was a compulsive player, Gibbs and the crew try to find out how far he would have gone to exact revenge on his arch-enemy, another seaman. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant's mummified body is found 10 years after his disappearance, prompting renewed interest in the case. Declared a deserter, he was given a dishonourable discharge - chiefly because $1million went missing from his ship's safe on the day he vanished. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs, Tony and Kate board an aircraft carrier to investigate the deaths of two crewmen who appear to have overdosed, even though the pair had no history of drug use. At first the inquiry seems doomed to failure - until training tapes offer an unlikely lead. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: Isabel does some digging into McKenna's past, Nico has a big decision to make and the team continues to investigate Squeakie's murder and the heist

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are led to a terminally ill bank robber after a man is blown up by what he thought was a fake bomb. The pair discover the crook is planning to take both his own life and that of the accomplice he has enlisted to assist him with his final heist. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A gamer is murdered, and when the investigation links him to a gang of hi-tech thieves using spyware to commit fraud, Goren is forced to delve into his own past for clues. Away from the case, Eames gives birth. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A member of a women's empowerment group is found murdered and her body mutilated, leading officers to the group's charismatic male leader. Meanwhile, Rollins keeps her pregnancy under wraps to avoid going on desk duty, while Fin and Carisi wonder who the father might be

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple whose student son has been missing for a week fear the worst when they discover a badly decomposed body on the roof of a downtown warehouse, and the CSIs are called to investigate further. However, the case is turned on its head when the autopsy reveals the dead man's true identity, and an anonymous phone call leads the team on a wild chase through the city. Crime drama, guest starring Helen Slater

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Newly gained artifacts take Nick and Monroe closer to the source of a long-gestating mystery. Elsewhere, Black Claw makes a deadly move that threatens to send Portland into disarray. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

Charles decides to spend as much of his kitty as possible, hoping a bigger outlay will result in huge profits. He goes for age, finding a pair of expensive 17th-century oak chairs. Margie also goes 17th century, but finds a crib that's much more within budget. The final auction is in Harrogate, North Yorkshire

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: After finding out at the age of 19 that the man who raised him was not his real dad, former British soldier David Smith yearns to find the biological father he has never met. After years of dreaming, he hopes to finally know what it feels like to be called 'son'. Meanwhile, Mandy Hearn, who was adopted as a baby in 1968, hopes to trace her birth mother. However, at just 13 years old when she gave birth, she is the youngest biological mother the programme has ever encountered. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell

programme.desc: The Premier League Darts season continues with Night 10 at the Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes. Last years tournament saw Englishman Glen Durrant win the tournament after finishing top of the table at the end of the regular season. He won eight of his sixteen matches before beating fellow Englishman Nathan Aspinall 11-8 in the final. Rob Cross disappointed last year, winning just one of his eight matches.

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.desc: The Premier League Darts season continues with Night 10 at the Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes.
